import os, subprocess
path = r'C:\Users\Revexn\Desktop\antigravity\seconde-exp'
result = subprocess.run(['findstr', '/s', '/i', '/m', 'page_id access_token', path + r'\*.*'], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=20, cwd=path)
print('STDOUT:', result.stdout[:2000])
print('STDERR:', result.stderr[:500])
print('---')
for f in ['.env', '.env.local', 'config.json', 'settings.json', 'fb_config.json', 'facebook.json', 'credentials.json']:
    fp = os.path.join(path, f)
    if os.path.exists(fp):
        print(f'FOUND: {fp}')
        with open(fp, 'r', errors='ignore') as fh:
            print(fh.read()[:2000])
        print('---')
print('=== .vscode/settings.json ===')
vs = os.path.join(path, '.vscode', 'settings.json')
if os.path.exists(vs):
    with open(vs, 'r', errors='ignore') as fh:
        print(fh.read())
print('=== run_everything.bat ===')
bat = os.path.join(path, 'run_everything.bat')
if os.path.exists(bat):
    with open(bat, 'r', errors='ignore') as fh:
        print(fh.read())
description: بحث سريع بـ findstr + قراءة ملفات الإعدادات
